name: stable-diffusion-3.5-medium
description: 2.5 billion parameter image model with improved MMDiT-X architecture

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of your output image. This value is ignored if you are using an input image.
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

cfg.description: The guidance scale tells the model how similar the output should be to the prompt.
cfg.title: Cfg

image.description: Input image for image to image mode. The aspect ratio of your output will match this image.
image.title: Image

negative_prompt.description: What you do not want to see in the image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt_strength.description: Prompt strength (or denoising strength) when using image to image. 1.0 corresponds to full destruction of information in image.
prompt_strength.title: Prompt Strength

seed.description: Set a seed for reproducibility. Random by default.
seed.title: Seed
